ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the character's role and traits */,
  "character_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character type */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of the character's birth */,
  "death_year" INTEGER /* Year of the character's death (if applicable) */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the house or family the character belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to a character image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the character was created in the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the character's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_character_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_type_id") REFERENCES character_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "source_character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source character */,
  "target_character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target character */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., Undirected) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight indicating the strength of the relationship */,
  "book" INTEGER /* ID of the book in which this relationship is significant */,
  "contextual_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the relationship, such as key events or scenes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the relationship (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was created in the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the relationship's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_book FOREIGN KEY ("book") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_target_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_source_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "book_title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the book */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series to which the book belongs */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the book cover image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the book was created in the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the book's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the character type (e.g., Knight, Noble, Commoner) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the character type was created in the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the character type's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location's significance */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the location is part of */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to a location image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the location was created in the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the location's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_location" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the character is primarily based */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the character started being associated with the location */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the character stopped being associated with the location (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mapping was created in the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the mapping information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_location_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_location_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme and its relevance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the theme was created in the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the theme's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_themes" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme associated with the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mapping was created in the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the mapping information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_themes_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_themes_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, fan) */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user profile was created in the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user profile's information */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
